records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Doesn't this feel weird to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It hasn't even been a month since we were discharged from this hospital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It hasn't even been a month since we were discharged from this hospital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It hasn't even been a month since we were discharged from this hospital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So why are we back here again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So why are we back here again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So why are we back here again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, wrapped up like a mummy in bandages, you're hardly one to complain, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, wrapped up like a mummy in bandages, you're hardly one to complain, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, wrapped up like a mummy in bandages, you're hardly one to complain, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear what the doctor said? Just being alive is a miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear what the doctor said? Just being alive is a miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear what the doctor said? Just being alive is a miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, no kidding. Getting pounded by a Category 6 C.O. and making it out? That's a miracle in itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, no kidding. Getting pounded by a Category 6 C.O. and making it out? That's a miracle in itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, no kidding. Getting pounded by a Category 6 C.O. and making it out? That's a miracle in itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how do you explain the fact that we spent hours down in that abyss, and only three hours passed in the real world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how do you explain the fact that we spent hours down in that abyss, and only three hours passed in the real world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how do you explain the fact that we spent hours down in that abyss, and only three hours passed in the real world?

records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* How did we even make it back alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still doesn't feel real.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still doesn't feel real.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still doesn't feel real.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Laika.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Laika.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Laika.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Of course not!

records.m_Talk_DEU: You got pretty banged up protecting me this time, so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You got pretty banged up protecting me this time, so...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, we've always got each other's backs. Just means it was my turn to take the hit.
